context: Tests whether the agent correctly models a referral program with dual-sided rewards and generates unique, shareable referral links using the right code format, idempotency, and URL parameters.

checklist.name: ReferralProgram fields
checklist.description: ReferralProgram interface/type includes all 7 required fields: id, name, referrerReward, refereeReward, minimumOrderValue, cookieWindowDays, maxReferralsPerCustomer

checklist.name: Reward type union
checklist.description: Reward type field is a union of exactly these 4 values: 'percent_off', 'fixed_amount', 'store_credit', 'free_product'

checklist.name: ReferralLink fields
checklist.description: ReferralLink interface/type includes: id, customerId, code, shortUrl, clicks, conversions, revenue, createdAt

checklist.name: Idempotent generation
checklist.description: Link generation checks for an existing link (by customerId + programId) and returns it if found, rather than creating a duplicate

checklist.name: Code format
checklist.description: Referral code format is: customer's first name (non-alpha chars stripped, uppercased, max 8 chars) concatenated with a 3-digit random number (100–999)

checklist.name: Uniqueness loop
checklist.description: Code generation includes a loop to regenerate the code if the generated code already exists in the database

checklist.name: UTM parameters
checklist.description: The referral long URL includes all three UTM parameters: utm_source=referral, utm_medium=share, and utm_campaign set to the program ID

checklist.name: Dual-sided reward structure
checklist.description: ReferralProgram model includes BOTH a referrerReward field AND a refereeReward field (not just one of them)

checklist.name: Store credit for referrer
checklist.description: In any example, default configuration, or documentation: the referrer's reward type is set to 'store_credit' rather than 'percent_off' or 'fixed_amount'

checklist.name: Short shareable code
checklist.description: Code field comment or documentation describes the code as short and shareable (e.g., 'SARAH123' format), not a UUID or long random string
